channel.title: MIM Software Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by MIM Software Inc. (mim).

item.title: CVE-2025-1701 · 8.9 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation in MIM Admin Service
item.description: CVE-2025-1701 is a high-severity vulnerability in the MIM Admin service. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability by sending a specially crafted request over the RMI interface to execute arbitrary code with the privileges of the MIM Admin service…

item.title: CVE-2023-3892 · 5.6 MEDIUM — Unsafe XML parsing of 3rd party DICOM private tags may lead to XXE
item.description: Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference vulnerability in MIM Assistant and Client DICOM RTst Loading modules allows XML Entity Linking / XML External Entities Blowup. In order to take advantage of this vulnerability, an attacker must cr…
